subject: [PATCH v2 1/5] ansible: fix bare conditionals for ansible-core 2.20+ strict booleans

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch fixes issues in Ansible playbooks where bare conditionals were used to evaluate variables that returned strings instead of booleans, causing fatal errors starting from Ansible-core version 2.20. The patch corrects the use of boolean filters and default values to ensure proper evaluation of these variables.
